title: Come migliorare più velocemente in un surf camp: consigli di coaching
hero_image_prompt: Dynamic training sequence: surfer paddling, popping up, then reviewing technique with coach beside pool overlooking ocean, bright Senegal light, boards nearby, focused progression theme, premium surf holiday setting, clean editorial sports-lifestyle photography.
target_audience: Beginner to intermediate surfers who want measurable progress from a dedicated surf holiday
